## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is for the Docker image in this repo, not the bare-metal install script.
- [ ] I updated README, env examples, or compose examples if behavior changed.
- [ ] I tested the affected path: image/runtime / client management / VPN connection / docs only.

- [ ] I noted the OpenVPN protocol/port and client app tested, if relevant.
- [ ] I did not include private keys, client certificates, `.ovpn` files, env secrets, VPN credentials, or private data.
